data.title: Tineco debuts FLOOR ONE Artist Series at Milan Fashion Week, redefining home care with elegance and innovation.
data.description: In NEUSS, Germany & MILAN, the spotlight of Milan Fashion Week was on elegance, innovation, and perfection where Tineco, a top brand for smart cleaning appliances, joined forces with TikTok for the prestigious event. Tineco made a lasting impression as the sole cleaning brand featured at Fashion Week. Showcasing its FLOOR ONE Artist Series, Tineco is setting new standards in home care by blending advanced technology with sophisticated design. This collaboration took center stage, signaling a fresh approach to cleaning solutions in the fashion world.

data.title: PCI Pal appoints Royston Ballard as new CISO following previous CISO Geoff Forsyth's retirement. Ballard has 20+ years of cybersecurity experience.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, PCI Pal® (LON: PCIP), a worldwide leader in secure payment solutions, has recently appointed Royston Ballard as their new Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). Ballard takes over from the retiring Geoff Forsyth, who had a successful career in technology, CX, and information security. Possessing over 20 years of cybersecurity expertise, including ten years in top leadership roles, Ballard will now lead the company's security strategies moving forward. Forsyth's departure marks the end of an era for PCI Pal as they transition leadership in their commitment to providing secure payment solutions.

data.title: Cerillion recognized as Major Player in IDC MarketScape for Telco Customer Experience Platforms 2025.
data.description: Cerillion, a top provider of composable BSS/OSS solutions for the telecoms sector, based in London and listed on AIM under the ticker symbol CER, revealed on September 25th, 2025, that it has been recognized as a Major Player in the IDC MarketScape report on Worldwide Customer Experience Platforms for Telecommunications. The report is a comprehensive analysis that evaluates key industry players in the global telecom market. This recognition solidifies Cerillion's position as a significant contributor in the industry, highlighting its expertise and impact on customer experience in the telecommunications sector.

data.title: Aker invests in Nscale's $1.1B funding round, gaining 9.3% ownership. Aker's stake may rise with future IPO.
data.description: Aker has acquired a significant stake in Nscale, making them one of the company's largest shareholders. Through a Series B round investment, Aker now holds a 9.3% ownership in Nscale on a fully diluted basis. Additionally, Aker's existing 50% stake in the Aker-Narvik joint venture allows for potential conversion into more Nscale shares during a future IPO. This strategic move positions Aker to increase its influence in Nscale and potentially benefit from its growth.

data.title: Bitcoin price hits $111,517, testing lower Bollinger Band, indicating neutral momentum amidst bullish trend.
data.description: The current price of Bitcoin stands at $111,517, showing a 1.03% decrease within the day. It is hovering close to the Bollinger Band support. Technical indicators suggest a neutral momentum, although the long-term trend remains bullish.
H&M SHARES RISE 12% AFTER 3Q EARNINGS BEAT ESTIMATES

data.title: Swift plans new rules for retail payments to boost speed and predictability, involving 30+ banks, aiming to enhance cross-border experience for consumers.
data.description: In Brussels, Swift and participating banks are progressing towards facilitating cross-border payments with the goal of making them as easy as domestic transfers. Swift will implement new network regulations to guarantee a fast and reliable experience for individuals and small enterprises transferring funds globally. Collaborating with more than 30 pioneer banks, Swift is devising a scheme framework to offer retail clients assurance and consistency in sending money worldwide.

data.title: Pepper Advantage to acquire Computershare's UK mortgage servicing business, increasing AUM to around £50 billion.
data.description: A top international credit management and technology firm, Pepper Advantage, has revealed their plans to acquire Computershare's UK mortgage servicing business, Computershare Loan Services, subject to regulatory approval. This acquisition move is expected to significantly boost Pepper Advantage's assets under management (AUM) in the UK to approximately £50 billion. The specific financial terms of the transaction have not been disclosed. The integration of Computershare's mortgage servicing business, which includes Topaz Finance, is a strategic move for Pepper Advantage.

data.title: Adva Network Security's 400G encryption solution approved by BSI for data classified as VS-NfD and EU/NATO "Restricted."
data.description: Adva Network Security unveiled a groundbreaking achievement today in Berlin, as its FSP 3000 S-Flex™ 400Gbit/s solution became the world's first to receive approval from the German Federal Office for Information Security (BSI). This approval enables the transportation of data classified as "Verschlusssache – Nur für den Dienstgebrauch (VS-NfD)" - meaning "For Official Use Only," as well as EU/NATO "Restricted." No other 400Gbit/s solution currently available has secured this prestigious level of accreditation. The success stems from Adva Network Security's innovative ConnectGuard™ technology.

data.title: Golden Suisse and Prof. Stiglitz host UHNWI Summit with 150 attendees at The Dolder Grand in Zurich.
data.description: On September 10th, Golden Suisse organized an upscale private wealth event at The Dolder Grand in Zurich, attended by over 150 distinguished Ultra-High-Net-Worth Individuals (UHNWIs) and family office leaders from 80 different locations.

data.title: Paligo appoints Rahul Yadav as new CEO to accelerate growth with focus on product innovation and AI.
data.description: Paligo, a prominent company in cloud-based Component Content Management Systems (CCMS), has appointed a new customer-centric technology leader to drive their market dominance and AI-driven expansion in the upcoming decade. The announcement was made in Stockholm on September 25, 2025. This news marks a significant move for Paligo as they aim to continue their success in the industry.

data.title: Rockwell Automation partners with Avvale and ESGeo for OT-generated sustainability reporting solution to automate data collection and improve sharing of sustainability metrics.
data.description: A recently introduced solution is aiding industrial firms in automating the gathering and organization of operational data to enhance the monitoring, transparency, and dissemination of sustainability indicators. This development was announced in Milan on September 25, 2025. Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), the leading global company in this sector, is spearheading this initiative.

data.title: Broadridge introduces ISO 20022 cash messaging for global post-trade clients, benefiting over 200 bank and broker clients.
data.description: Broadridge Financial Solutions, a leading company in the Fintech industry, unveiled on September 25, 2025, that it has successfully provided complete ISO 20022 cash processing services to its worldwide bank and broker/dealer clientele. This development ensures that clients, including those trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BR, are now equipped with advanced capabilities in cash processing.

data.title: V2 Cloud introduces V2CloudCare, a revolutionary cloud resilience solution. Leader in remote computing.
data.description: V2 Cloud, a top provider in fully managed cloud desktop, server, and application solutions for centralized, secure, and cost-effective remote computing, introduced V2CloudCare on September 25, 2025. This innovative service aims to transform cloud services by offering comprehensive support and solutions.

data.title: Raspberry Pi and NComputing join forces to introduce budget-friendly, secure Raspberry Pi 500+ keyboard computer to enterprises.
data.description: In a joint announcement made on September 25, 2025, in San Francisco and Cambridge, England, Raspberry Pi and NComputing revealed a significant partnership. The collaboration aims to introduce the Raspberry Pi 500+, an all-in-one keyboard computer, into the enterprise sector. By integrating this product with NComputing's LEAF OS, the partnership offers a comprehensive solution tailored for enterprise use. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to target the enterprise market with a cutting-edge product, merging the hardware expertise of Raspberry Pi with the software capabilities of NComputing.

data.title: 22 researchers, Citation Laureates 2025 announced by Clarivate Plc including first from mainland China.
data.description: London, September 25, 2025 - Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT), a renowned global provider of insightful intelligence, has revealed the Citation Laureates 2025 list, honoring 22 exceptional researchers. Notably, this year's list includes the first Citation Laureate hailing from mainland China.
